nasb.text: From the outcry at Heshbon even to Elealeh, even to Jahaz they have raised their voice, from Zoar even to Horonaim and to Eglath-shelishiyah; for even the waters of Nimrim will become desolate.

esv.text: “From the outcry at Heshbon even to Elealeh, as far as Jahaz they utter their voice, from Zoar to Horonaim and Eglath-shelishiyah. For the waters of Nimrim also have become desolate.

cnv.text: “希實本的哀叫傳到以利亞利，他們發出的聲音傳到雅雜，從瑣珥達到何羅念和伊基拉．施利施亞；因為連寧林的河水也都乾涸了。

ccb.text: “哀哭声从希实本传到以利亚利和雅杂，又从琐珥传到何罗念和伊基拉·施利施亚，因为连宁林的水也干涸了。”
